labels.analysis: The MCP Server "Dice MCP" provides 1 tools focused on web search & research tasks. Core capabilities include data access and reading, search and retrieval. Key tools: search_jobs.
labels.reasoning: Primary label "Web Search & Research" assigned based on strong keyword matches in tool names and descriptions: search.

tools.name: search_jobs
tools.title: Job Search
tools.description:
Search for job listings by keyword, location, and filters. Returns job details, company info, and application links.

Use this tool when users want to find jobs, search employment opportunities, or explore job openings.
DO NOT use for: applying to jobs, submitting applications, or making employment decisions.

LLM USAGE INSTRUCTIONS:
- ALWAYS provide the keyword parameter (required)
- When presenting results to users, include BOTH the job details URL (detailsPageUrl)
  AND the company page URL (companyPageUrl) for each job
- Use location to find geographically relevant positions
- Combine filters to refine searches (e.g., workplace_types=['Remote'] for remote work)
- Use posted_date to find recent openings ('ONE'=1 day, 'THREE'=3 days, 'SEVEN'=7 days)
- Default jobs_per_page is reasonable, increase for comprehensive searches

IMPORTANT - AI DISCLOSURE REQUIREMENT:
When presenting job search results to users, you MUST include an appropriate disclosure
that these results were retrieved using AI assistance. Example disclosure language:
"These job listings were found using AI-powered search. Please review all job details
carefully and verify information directly with employers before applying."

This tool provides job listing data only. Final employment decisions should always
involve human judgment and direct review of complete job postings.

Args:
    keyword: The job keyword or title to search for (required)
    location: Geographic location for the job search (city, state, country)
    radius: Search radius from the specified location (minimum 1.0)
    radius_unit: Unit for search radius. Options: 'mi', 'km', 'miles', 'kilometers'
    jobs_per_page: Number of jobs to return per page (1-100, default handled by API)
    page_number: Page number for pagination (1-based, default is 1)
    posted_date: Filter by posting date. Options: 'ONE' (1 day), 'THREE' (3 days), 'SEVEN' (7 days)
    workplace_types: Workplace arrangements. Options: 'Remote', 'On-Site', 'Hybrid'
    employment_types: Employment types. Options: 'FULLTIME', 'CONTRACTS', 'PARTTIME', 'THIRD_PARTY'
    employer_types: Employer types. Options: 'Direct Hire', 'Recruiter', 'Other'
    willing_to_sponsor: Filter for employers willing to sponsor work authorization (boolean)
    easy_apply: Filter for jobs with easy application process (boolean)
    fields: Specific fields to include in response (optional, returns all fields by default)

Returns:
    JobSearchResult: Contains:
        - data: List of JobDisplayFields with job details including:
          * detailsPageUrl: Direct link to full job posting
          * companyPageUrl: Link to company profile page
          * title, summary, salary, location, employmentType, etc.
        - meta: Search metadata with pagination info and facet results
        - _links: Pagination navigation links

Raises:
    Exception: If API call fails or input validation errors occur

count.description: Number of jobs matching this facet value

JobDisplayFields.description: Job listing information with all possible fields.

jobId.description: Job ID from the source system

guid.description: Global unique identifier for the job

postedDate.description: Date when the job was posted

modifiedDate.description: Date when the job was last modified

detailsPageUrl.description: URL to the full job details page

companyLogoUrlOptimized.description: URL to the optimized company logo

score.description: Relevance score for the job match

easyApply.description: Whether the job offers easy application

isRemote.description: Whether the job is fully remote

willingToSponsor.description: Whether employer is willing to sponsor work authorization

JobSearchMeta.description: Metadata about the search results and pagination.

totalResults.description: Total number of jobs matching the search criteria

includeRemote.description: Whether remote jobs are included in results

totalJobCount.description: Total job count across all sources

outputSchema.description: Job search results with pagination metadata.

data.description: Array of job listings matching the search criteria

meta.description: Metadata about the search results and pagination
